_description: Top-level manifest of the project-local Agency-to-Structure Engine instances in this repo. Per the three-layer model, loom-platform has one instance today (the dev-time agent that builds the site). Future surfaces (e.g., a hosted production agent visitors can chat with) would each get their own instance ID and their own folder. Instances MUST NOT share memory or context with each other.

instances.where_it_runs: Inside the operator's Claude Code sessions when they open this repo to build the site
watches: integration patterns with Make_Skills engine endpoints
demo-build patterns the site itself will showcase
instances.boundary: Developer-facing agency only. If a future production instance (e.g., loom-platform-prod) is added for the deployed site's embedded agent, it MUST NOT share memory or context with this instance.
